mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, code, sync_source, status, created_at, updated_at FROM currency WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND UPPER(TRIM(code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{code})) LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM currency WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND UPPER(TRIM(code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{code}))
mapper.insert: insert into currency (tenant_id, code, sync_source, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{tenantId}, #{code}, #{syncSource}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO account_currency (account_id, tenant_id, currency_id, sort_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{accountId}, #{tenantId},#{currencyId}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.name, a.account_id FROM account a INNER JOIN account_tenant_access ata ON ata.account_id = a.id AND ata.tenant_id = #{tenantId} INNER JOIN account_currency ac ON ac.account_id = a.id AND ac.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND ac.currency_id = #{currencyId} ORDER BY a.name ASC, a.account_id ASC
